title: A picnic in the park
description: For each question, write the correct answer. Write one word for each gap.

content.text: Last Sunday, my family had a picnic in the park because the weather was warm. We found a quiet place (27) a large tree and put a blanket on the grass. My mum had prepared sandwiches, fruit and homemade cake. While we were eating, my little sister ran around chasing butterflies, and my dad read a book. After lunch, we walked (28) the lake and watched people feeding ducks. The park was busier (29) it usually is, but it still felt peaceful. Later, some friends from school arrived and joined us for a game of football. I was tired afterwards, although I enjoyed spending time outdoors. Before we left, we made sure to collect all our rubbish and put it (30) a bin. I think picnics are a simple way (31) relax with family. We may go again next weekend (32) the weather stays nice.
